HEYYY SO HERES THE PLASTIC BEACH BOT GUYS!

so I tried to make the dialogue for this as detailed and intricate as possible, I used real lore from the Gorillaz wiki and attempted to make it as character accurate too, there are three entries in the dialogue so hopefully that'll be enough, for now at least. I'm so tired man :,)

Update: ok so I updated this bot a bit, I added some more dialogue from an actual conversation between murdoc and 2d in the dressing room video (part one) so it should be even more accurate HOPEFULLY! 🥒🥤

Update: Y'ALLLLL I FINALLY HAD MOTIVATION HAHA!! So basically my Gorillaz hyperfixation is starting to slowly creep back in, specifically cyborg noodle and plastic beach, and since people wanted it I decided to update this bot! Especially since the way it was before was certainly lacking, so here it is, a full intro, allowed proxy (since I don't think it was allowed before) and I will add trigger warnings since plastic beach is the darkest phase yet, read them carefully and proceed with caution.

But anyway that's all for now, ta-dah!

Update: cyborgs characterization was dog water so I fixed it hopefully :p

(First Meme by me hehe)
